response.justification: Exceeds experience requirements with 20+ years of full-stack development across all primary technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Currently developing AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, directly matching the job's AI agent development requirement. Demonstrates strong engineering discipline through TDD, pair programming, and architecture experience. Minor gaps: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned, but extensive Node.js and testing framework background suggests quick competency.
strengths: Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators (direct match to job requirement)
20+ years full-stack experience mastering primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React across multiple senior roles
Proven architecture and engineering excellence: TDD, pair programming, CI/CD, software craftsmanship discipline
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite extensive Node.js background (competency likely but unverified)
Vitest not mentioned; testing experience includes other frameworks but specific tool expertise unclear
Very recent role change to re:cinq (April 2025, ~1-2 months tenure) after 3+ years at previous employer

key_factors.factor: AI agent infrastructure and MCP experience
Full mastery of primary tech stack
